files.description: World Bank WDI indicator SP.POP.TOTL (Population, total), 2023.
OWID extract: World row 2023 (UN WPP-based broad age groups) for marginal age derivation.

references.citation: UN Population Division, World Population Prospects 2024 (medium variant): global sex ratio at birth and survival yield near-parity among adults; rounded here.
Pew Research Center, Global Religious Futures / Religion Data (2020 round).
WHO Global Health Observatory (tobacco; alcohol patterns).
UNESCO UIS / World Bank education attainment aggregates (ISCED-oriented, global rough mix).
NCD-RisC / Lancet global height studies (adult means ~165–168 cm by sex); here a single global Gaussian prior on cm (illustrative marginal, not age-sex conditional).
Synthetic global marginal: literature ranges (anthropology / survey) combined; not a census.
StatCounter GlobalStats mobile OS share (device-weighted, not persons).
